title: AI Reasoning Workspace
description: A persistent, interactive workspace for deep research and multi-step AI reasoning.

title: Collaborative Research Sessions
description: Share your reasoning sessions with teammates for real-time collaborative thinking.

title: Knowledge Graph View
description: Visualize connections between ideas and past research sessions.

title: Citation & Source Engine
description: Automatic citation tracking with linked evidence for every claim in a session.

title: PDF & Document Upload
description: Upload PDFs, papers, and documents to ground AI reasoning in your own sources.

title: Reasoning History & Versioning
description: Browse and restore previous reasoning states like version control for your thinking.

title: Bring Your Own Model
description: Connect your own LLM API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) for flexible usage.

title: Live Web Search Grounding
description: Augment AI reasoning with live, cited web results for up-to-date information.

title: Markdown & PDF Export
description: Export your reasoning sessions as clean, structured Markdown or PDF documents.

title: Mobile App
description: A native mobile experience for reviewing and continuing sessions on the go.
